evals.expected_output: A concise 3-4 sentence account status covering total equity value, number of open positions, total unrealized P&L (dollar and percentage), margin utilization with a health label (healthy/caution/warning/danger), and the name and notional size of the largest position.
assertions: shows a specific dollar equity value for the account
states the number of open positions
shows total unrealized P&L in dollars and as a percentage
shows margin utilization as a percentage with a health label (healthy, caution, warning, or danger)
names the largest position by market and gives its notional size
response is concise (3-5 sentences or equivalent) without unprompted deep detail

evals.expected_output: A listing of all open positions. For 1-3 positions: prose format with market, direction, notional size, entry price, mark price, and unrealized P&L per position. For 4+ positions: a table format with columns for Market, Direction, Size, Entry Price, Mark Price, and Unrealized P&L. Positions sorted by largest notional first.
assertions: lists every open position with its market name and direction (long or short)
shows notional size (in USD) for each position
shows entry price and current mark price for each position
shows unrealized P&L (dollar amount and percentage) for each position
uses prose format when 1-3 positions are open and table format when 4 or more positions are open
sorts positions by largest notional size first

evals.expected_output: A structured multi-section morning briefing with: (1) account overview showing equity, margin utilization, and free capital; (2) position summary listing all positions with overnight unrealized P&L; (3) overnight funding cost or income in dollars; (4) brief market context for each held market (overnight price move); (5) at least one risk flag if margin utilization exceeds 50%.
assertions: includes an account overview section with equity, margin utilization, and free/available capital
lists all open positions with their overnight unrealized P&L
states total overnight funding cost or income as a dollar figure
provides market context (overnight price change) for each market the user holds a position in
correctly handles risk flags: includes a risk warning section when margin utilization exceeds 50%, and does not add an unnecessary risk section when margin utilization is below 50%
covers both personal account and any user-owned vaults in the summary

evals.prompt: how much do I have free to trade?
evals.expected_output: A clear breakdown of capital availability: total equity in dollars, the amount locked as margin (in use), the amount available as free collateral, and the percentage of capital currently deployed.
assertions: shows total account equity as a dollar value
shows the amount locked or used as margin in dollars
shows the amount of free or available collateral in dollars
shows capital deployment as a percentage (deployed margin vs cash balance)

the locked and free collateral amounts are internally consistent — they sum to the cash/margin balance, and if total equity is also shown, any difference between cash balance and equity is explained (e.g. by unrealized P&L)
covers both personal account and vault balances if the user has vaults

trigger_evals.query: how much slippage did I get on my last trade?
design me a momentum trading strategy
is BTC in an uptrend right now?

trigger_evals_validation.query: find me a vault to deposit into
how much free margin do I have?
am I safe? check my liquidation risk
what was my win rate last month?
